synopsis: Fate of the Jedi: Backlash, by Aaron Allston, is the fourth novel in the Fate of the Jedi series and was released on March 9, 2010. At the end of the book, it has an introduction to Fate of the Jedi: Allies. The audio version is narrated by Marc Thompson. The paperback was released on February 22, 2011.
title: Backlash
